const { site_id, article_register } = $json; const articles = article_register || []; const a0 = articles[0] || null; const a1 = articles[1] || null; const a2 = articles[2] || null; // Format date const fmt = (d) => { try { return new Date(d).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year:'numeric', month:'long', day:'numeric' }); } catch(e) { return d; } }; // Estimate read time (200 wpm) const readTime = (html) => { const words = html.replace(/<[^>]+>/g,'').split(/\s+/).length; return `${Math.max(3, Math.round(words/200))} Min Read`; }; const TEMPLATES = { sinabariplasticsurgery: (a0, a1, a2) => { const primaryCard = a0 ? `
article
Education / 00${articles.indexOf(a0)+1}

${a0.title}

${a0.excerpt}

Read Analysis arrow_forward
` : `
Case Study / 042

The Molecular Logic of Scars: Beyond Surface Healing

An in-depth exploration of how cellular memory dictates the trajectory of post-surgical recovery.

`; const secondaryCard = (art, fallbackLabel, fallbackTitle, fallbackExcerpt) => art ? `
article
Education

${art.title}

${art.excerpt}

` : `
${fallbackLabel}

${fallbackTitle}

${fallbackExcerpt}

`; return `

Latest Analysis

View Journal
${primaryCard}
${secondaryCard(a1, 'Transparency', 'Honest Recovery Timelines', 'The clinical reality of healing, debunking the instant transformation myth through biological timelines.')} ${secondaryCard(a2, 'Ethics', 'Risk Disclosure', 'A radical approach to informed consent. Every procedure analyzed through the lens of long-term safety.')}
`; }, sinabari_net: (a0, a1, a2) => { const primaryCard = a0 ? `
article
Analysis

${a0.title}

${a0.excerpt}

${readTime(a0.content_html||'')} ${fmt(a0.date)}
` : `
Deep Dive

The Architect's Framework: Designing Scalable Medical LLMs

An analytical breakdown of the structural requirements for large language models within specialized clinical environments.

12 Min ReadOct 24, 2024
`; const smallCard = (art, fallbackLabel, fallbackTitle, fallbackExcerpt, fallbackTag) => art ? `
Analysis

${art.title}

${art.excerpt}

${fmt(art.date)} arrow_outward
` : `
${fallbackLabel}

${fallbackTitle}

${fallbackExcerpt}

${fallbackTag} arrow_outward
`; return `
Intelligence Stream

Latest Analysis

Explore Archive arrow_forward
${primaryCard} ${smallCard(a1,'Case Study','Post-Operative Monitoring via Computer Vision','How edge-computing AI is reducing recovery times through real-time physiological mapping.','Clinical Data')} ${smallCard(a2,'Ethical AI','Algorithmic Transparency in Surgical Robotics','Defining the boundaries of autonomous decision-making in the operating theater.','Policy Insight')}
`; }, sinabarimd: (a0, a1, a2) => { const pubCard = (art, num, fallbackTag, fallbackTitle, fallbackExcerpt, isPrimary) => art ? `
${isPrimary ? `
New Publication

${art.title}

${art.excerpt}

Read Publication arrow_forward
` : `
Publication

${art.title}

${art.excerpt}

${fmt(art.date)}
`}
` : `
${isPrimary ? `
${fallbackTag}

${fallbackTitle}

${fallbackExcerpt}

` : `
${fallbackTag}

${fallbackTitle}

${fallbackExcerpt}

`}
`; return `

Selected Publications

Commentary and analysis on surgical precision, patient outcomes, and clinical AI integration.

View All Publications arrow_forward
${pubCard(a0, 1, 'Key Monograph', 'Optimizing Surgical Outcomes through Advanced Clinical Data Synthesis', 'A compendium of insights on precision, outcomes, and AI integration in surgical practice.', true)}
${pubCard(a1, 2, 'Commentary', 'Clinical AI in Practice', 'Notes on deploying intelligent systems within surgical and post-operative workflows.', false)} ${pubCard(a2, 3, 'Perspective', 'The Patient Relationship', 'Reflections on long-term care, informed consent, and the ethics of modern surgery.', false)}
`; }, drsinabari: (a0, a1, a2) => { // Editorial — long-form, minimal card style const essayCard = (art, size, fallbackTitle, fallbackExcerpt) => art ? `
${fmt(art.date)} ${art.title}

${art.excerpt}

Read Essay →
` : `
Commentary ${fallbackTitle}

${fallbackExcerpt}

`; return `

Recent Writing

All Essays →
${essayCard(a0,'primary','On the Future of Medicine and Identity','A physician reflects on the intersection of technology, ethics, and human care.')}
${essayCard(a1,'secondary','The Weight of the White Coat','Notes from the examining room on authority, vulnerability, and trust.')} ${essayCard(a2,'secondary','What Surgery Cannot Fix','On the limits of intervention and the necessity of honest conversation.')}
`; }, }; const renderer = TEMPLATES[site_id] || TEMPLATES.sinabariplasticsurgery; const sectionHtml = renderer(a0, a1, a2); return [{ json: { ...$json, rendered_section: sectionHtml } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ site_id: $('Extract Publish Fields').first().json.site_id, publish_date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, site_id: $('Extract Publish Fields').first().json.site_id, article_title: $('Extract Publish Fields').first().json.article.title, article_url: $('Extract Publish Fields').first().json.live_url + '/articles/' + $('Generate Article Page').first().json.article_slug + '.html', published_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ site_id: $('Extract Publish Fields').first().json.site_id, article_url: 'https://' + $('Extract Publish Fields').first().json.domain + '/articles/' + $('Extract Publish Fields').first().json.article.slug + '.html', source: 'publisher' }) }}
